navigationModel: single-page, no bottom tabs, no sidebar (per spec §5). review-page is the only surface; completion/empty are conditional renders within it.
scaffoldShellNote: Template ships a fixed bottom-tab shell, but the product spec explicitly requires a single-page no-tab app. The bottom-tab shell will be replaced at visual-integration time by a single ReviewPage entry; recorded as an intended navigation rewrite driven by the product spec, not a silent change.

fields.id: string (stable, used for list itemIdPattern review-card-{index})
fields.stage: string (stage/level id the word belongs to)

fields.queue: WordCard[] (ordered review queue; index 0 = current card)
fields.total: number (initial deck size for this round)
fields.reviewAgainCount: number (words pushed to tail via 不认识 at least once)

computedState.empty: /review/empty = stage has zero words (no deck to load)

persistenceRelevant: currentStage is the only durable setting (persisted via preferences when wired; headless falls back to default 'stage-1').
Per-round state is in-memory only (spec §6: only this-round known/unknown counts, no cross-round history).

WordLibrary.role: local word library data source. Returns WordCard[] for a given stage. Built-in local dataset (no network). Spec §6 prefers local persistence; built-in resource data is the source of truth for available words.

PreferencesStore.role: durable store for currentStage. Uses HarmonyOS preferences when available; headless logic uses an in-memory fallback with the same interface. Deferred-to-wiring stub at headless stage.

ReviewController.role: @Observed view-model / state machine. Owns the round queue + counts + flip state. Exposes event methods mapping 1:1 to ui-tree events.

stateMachine.initial: empty (no round loaded) -> transitions to 'active' on load-words/restart-round when stage has words; transitions to 'complete' when queue drains; 'complete' -> 'active' on restart-round

transitions.effect: build queue, reset counts, currentWord = queue[0]
remove queue[0], knownCount++, reset isFlipped=false, advance to next; if queue empty -> complete
move queue[0] to tail, reset isFlipped=false, advance (queue length unchanged)
rebuild queue from library for current stage, reset counts

interactionFlows.name: mark-known
steps: if queue now empty set isComplete + snapshot finalKnownCount
interactionFlows.expectedState: remainingCount decreased by 1, knownCount +1, next card front shown

interactionFlows.name: mark-unknown
steps: move front card to tail (preserve relative order, do NOT shuffle)
errorPaths: no-op when complete/empty; single-card case: card stays front (moved to its own tail)

interactionFlows.name: restart-round
steps: rebuild queue from WordLibrary for current stage

interactionFlows.name: load-words
steps: if non-empty -> active; else stay empty
interactionFlows.expectedState: active with deck, or remains empty

changeRequests: Template Index.ets is a bottom-tab shell importing 7 nonexistent placeholder pages (HomePage, ExplorePage, ...). Per spec §5 the app is single-page no-tab; visual integration must replace Index entry content with a single ReviewPage and remove the BottomTabBar usage. This is a spec-driven navigation rewrite, flagged here (not silent).
route in ui-tree is 'pages/ReviewPage'; this page is visual-integration work (not yet implemented in headless pass).
